message:
feat(browser): add signed URL write support for remote uploads

Add export methods to Vault class:
- exportToLance(tableName) - Export table to Lance format bytes
- uploadToUrl(data, url) - Upload binary data via PUT with progress
- exportToRemote(tableName, signedUrl) - Export and upload in one call

Features:
- Automatic type inference for columns (int, float, string, bool, vector)
- XHR progress callback support for large uploads
- Compatible with S3/R2/GCS pre-signed URLs

Tests: 158 passed (+2 new export tests)
